portfolio.title: Remote-work evidence review
portfolio.thesis: Productivity claims are only meaningful when scoped by worker and task.

hypotheses.title: A local productivity gain does not generalize across roles
hypotheses.summary: The 13% Ctrip gain is specific to solo call-centre work.

hypotheses.title: A stable question tree lets evidence accumulate
hypotheses.summary: Findings mapped to fixed nodes retain their scope limits.
